comment: FROZEN TFPT targets + kill windows for the live watch channels. Every value is extracted verbatim from verification/predictions_frozen.json (freeze 2026-06-09) or from the corresponding experiments/evidence_scorecard.json row (provenance per channel). This file is the frozen side of the monitor -- it NEVER changes with new data; only measurements.json does.

channels.observable: solar mixing angle sin^2(theta_12) -- PREDICTION OF RECORD
channels.kill_criterion: JUNO value away from 0.306747 beyond 3 sigma kills the seam-misalignment reading
channels.provenance: predictions_frozen.json id SIN2_THETA12_SEED (role prediction_of_record); scorecard row 'sin^2 theta12'

channels.kill_criterion: systematics-controlled exclusion of 0.2424 deg at > 3 sigma (incl. precise zero or wrong sign)
channels.provenance: predictions_frozen.json id BETA_BIREFRINGENCE_DEG; scorecard row 'cosmic birefringence beta'

channels.formula: minimal Lambda branch => w = -1 exactly (w0 = -1, wa = 0)
channels.kill_criterion: w != -1 at >= 5 sigma in a single systematics-controlled overlap-aware combination
channels.provenance: predictions_frozen.json id RHOL_OVER_MBAR4 (kill: 'robust w != -1'); scorecard row 'dark-energy equation of state w' (watch_level high); experiments/dark-energy-w-watchdog

channels.observable: rare kaon BR(K+ -> pi+ nu nubar)
channels.formula: TFPT-CKM point + external short-distance functions (F_transfer bridge, NOT a primitive compiler output)
channels.kill_criterion: BR(K+) outside [7,12]e-11 (scorecard kill window for the downstream bridge)
channels.provenance: scorecard row 'rare kaon BR(K+ -> pi+ nu nu)' (stage downstream_bridge); experiments/rare-kaon-bridge

channels.observable: inflation running alpha_s = d n_s / d ln k
channels.formula: -2/N_star^2 at N_star = 51.4 (LO; band over N_star in [50,60])
channels.kill_criterion: robust alpha_s < -5e-3 or > +3e-3 at >= 5 sigma; any robust POSITIVE running (>= 5 sigma) kills the plateau branch

channels.watch_sigma_note: scorecard types this row 'tension' at the current ~2.0 sigma pull; threshold set just below so the channel mirrors the scorecard status instead of flapping around the generic 2.0 cut
channels.kill_criterion: persistent deviation beyond 3 sigma after global fit (currently ~2 sigma, the largest frozen core pull)
channels.provenance: predictions_frozen.json id SIN2_THETA13; scorecard row 'sin^2 theta13' (status tension)

channels.formula: 1 - 2/N_star, N_star in [50,60] (external reheating input); slow-reheating branch N_star = 51.4
channels.kill_criterion: value robustly outside the Starobinsky window at fixed reheating (scorecard: n_s >= 0.967 robustly)
channels.experiment: Simons Observatory / SPT-3G / LiteBIRD (current: Planck / DESI combos)
channels.provenance: predictions_frozen.json conditional_bands id N_S; scorecard row 'inflation n_s (Starobinsky/scalaron)'

channels.kill_criterion: r > 0.01 robustly kills the R^2 branch; band excluded at CMB-S4 (> 5 sigma)
channels.provenance: predictions_frozen.json conditional_bands id R_TENSOR; scorecard row 'inflation r (tensor ratio)'
